rule_text: Never use bold + ALL CAPS + color emphasis simultaneously on the same string except in chart headlines and the campaign headline lockup. Pick at most two emphasis devices per element.
intent: Prevent over-emphasized, cluttered strings by limiting stacked emphasis devices.
summary: copy_editorial: Avoid using bold + ALL CAPS + color emphasis simultaneously on one string, except in chart headlines and campaign headline lockups; max two emphasis types per element.
